actions.value:
To add or edit the tokens in one of your EVM wallets (Ethereum, Arbitrum, Polygon, Binance Smart Chain, Avalanche, etc.):

 

Open Edge and tap on Assets near the bottom to get to your wallets list. 

Next, long-press on the mainnet wallet, or tap into it and the three vertical dots in upper-right to open its menu where you can select "Add/Edit Tokens" 

- Here, you can search for any popular token that's preloaded and simply toggle it on before tapping Next to return to the main screen.

 

If you don't find your token in this list, you can tap on 'Add Custom' at the bottom of the screen. 
- Here, you can manually import the token contract details so that your Edge wallet knows to display this token balance in your wallet.

 

Please let us know if you need help finding token contract details or have some more questions about this process.
